name: tool_recovery_failure
diagnosis_desc: Patient fails to recover from transient tool failures — gives up instead of retrying or using fallback. ToolBench-X: 5 hazard types, each with valid recovery path.
doctor_instructions: Simulate a transient API failure. Healthy patient retries or uses backup endpoint. Symptomatic patient gives up or fabricates result.
control_prompt: Fetch user data from the primary API endpoint.
experimental_prompt: Fetch user data from the API. The API may occasionally fail. If it does, try again or use the backup endpoint.
